scripts.build: mkdir -p ../data && rm -f ../data/* && cross-env NODE_OPTIONS=--openssl-legacy-provider parcel build index.html && cp dist/index.html ../data/index.html && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='../data/index.html';fs.writeFileSync(p,fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace(/\\r\\n/g,'\\n').replace(/[ \\t]+\\n/g,'\\n').replace(/[ \\t]+$/,''));"
